sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12559" key="a)poduspe/thsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποδυσ-πέτησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n12559.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">discouragement, despair,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">35</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
